title: Unlock Your Piano Potential
audience: Aspiring piano players frustrated with sheet music
goal: Encourage viewers to download the free cheat sheet
hook: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order.

scenes.headline: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order.
scenes.voiceover: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order.

assets.description: Musician or student looking frustrated or confused while reading sheet music at a piano, with furrowed brows and a tense posture.

scenes.headline: Feeling overwhelmed?
scenes.voiceover: Are you stuck trying to read complicated sheet music? Do you feel overwhelmed and confused?

scenes.headline: You can change this!
scenes.body: With the right approach, you can unlock your musicality and have fun at the piano.
scenes.voiceover: Imagine playing your favorite songs by ear, feeling the music flow through you. You can learn to play with just four simple chords!

scenes.headline: Join countless others!
scenes.body: Many have transformed their playing and found joy in music.
scenes.voiceover: With the right approach, you can unlock your musicality and have fun at the piano.

assets.description: Black musician or pianist playing confidently at a piano in a church or music studio, smiling with joy and passion.

scenes.headline: Start your journey now!
scenes.voiceover: Get the free 4-chord cheat sheet and start your journey today!

voiceover_script: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order. Are you stuck trying to read complicated sheet music? Do you feel overwhelmed and confused? It doesn't have to be this way. Imagine playing your favorite songs by ear, feeling the music flow through you. You can learn to play with just four simple chords! With the right approach, you can unlock your musicality and have fun at the piano. Get the free 4-chord cheat sheet and start your journey today!
thumbnail_concept: A close-up of a smiling musician playing piano with confidence.
caption: Stop struggling with sheet music and learn to play by ear! Download the free 4-chord cheat sheet now.
